name: coding-plugins
description: Chinese-first coding workflow plugin with English agent-facing skills for Codex and Claude Code.

interface.shortDescription: Chinese-first coding workflow with English agent-facing skills for planning, TDD, debugging, review, and finishing.
interface.longDescription: Coding Plugins is a Chinese-first local workflow plugin for Codex and Claude Code. It provides English agent-facing skills for brainstorming, SDD, planning, TDD, systematic debugging, parallel agent coordination, code review, Git commits with Authored-by footers, skill authoring, and branch finishing.
defaultPrompt: I have an idea; help me compare options before deciding whether to build it.
I want to implement a feature; help me write the specification first.
Help me fix this with a test-driven workflow.
Check whether this change is ready to finish.
